coverage_note: The bundled IL4R population database is literature oriented and does not include a complete allele-frequency panel. Interpretation should remain ancestry-, phenotype-, tissue-, assay-, and LD-aware.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from IL4R asthma, atopy, airway, epithelial-barrier, and immune-inflammatory literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000077238: IL4R coordinates and transcripts

gene_population_patterns.summary: rs1801275 (IL4R Ile50Val) is curated as a low-penetrance research signal in IL4R or a linked locus; cohort design, ancestry, LD, and phenotype definition matter.
rs1805010 (IL4R Gln576Arg) is curated as a low-penetrance research signal in IL4R or a linked locus; cohort design, ancestry, LD, and phenotype definition matter.
IL4R interpretation is most useful when sequence, methylation, expression, tissue, and allergic-immune phenotype evidence are integrated rather than treated as a single deterministic SNP call.
